languages.text: "Я все еще... Да, Нунциус, конечно, потерпи, мы будем едины..." {n}В манипулусе не осталось ни капли былой рациональности — его взгляд охвачен безумием. Он судорожно извлекает искаженные аугменты из трупа и безжалостно прилаживает их внутрь себя, игнорируя боль и кровь. Последним он извлекает кортикальный имплант из головы Нунциуса — оплавленный кусок мертвого металла, покрытый ошметками мозгового вещества. Что-то тихо нашептывая, Эоганн припаивает его рядом со своим сердцем.{/n}

"I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. He desperately extracts the distorted augments from the corpse and mercilessly reattaches them inside himself, heedless of the pain and blood. Last of all, he removes the cortical implant from Nuncius's head — a melted piece of dead metal covered in lumps of brain matter. Whispering words you cannot make out, Eogunn solders it next to his heart.{/n}

languages.text: «Sigo... Sí, Nuncius, aguante un poco más y seremos uno...». {n}El manipulus ha perdido el último atisbo de cordura. Su mirada se ha sumido en la locura. Desesperado, extrae los aumentos deformes del cadáver y se los instala a sí mismo, ignorando el dolor y la sangre. Por último, extrae el implante cortical de la cabeza de Nuncius, un trozo de metal inerte fundido con trozos de materia gris pegados. Susurrando algo que no llegas a oír, Eogunn lo suelda junto a su corazón.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. languages.text: “我还在努力……没错，努恩修斯，再坚持一会儿，我们就要融为一体了……”{n}这位操纵者已彻底丧失了最后一丝理性，他的目光如今已被疯狂所支配。他绝望地从那具尸体中取出扭曲的植入物，又毫不留情地将它们重新植入自己体内，全然不顾那剧痛与喷涌的鲜血。最后，他从努恩修斯的头颅中取出了那个皮层植入物——一块熔毁的、毫无生气的金属，上面糊满了脑组织凝成的块状物。伊奥贡口中低语着你无法听清的字句，将其熔焊在自己的心脏近旁。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. He desperately extracts the distorted augments from the corpse and mercilessly reattaches them inside himself, heedless of the pain and blood. Last of all, he removes the cortical implant from Nuncius's head — a melted piece of dead metal covered in lumps of brain matter. Whispering words you cannot make out, Eogunn solders it next to his heart.{/n}

languages.text: « Je suis encore... Oui, Nuncius, c'est bien, encore un peu de patience, nous ne ferons plus qu'un... » {n}Le manipulus a perdu le peu de rationalité qui lui restait. Son regard est entièrement habité par la folie. Il extrait désespérément les augmentations dénaturées du cadavre et se les greffe une à une, sans se soucier du sang et de sa propre douleur. Enfin, il retire l'implant cortical de la tête de Nuncius, un morceau de métal fondu couvert de morceaux de cervelle, et murmure des paroles qui vous échappent tandis qu'il le soude à côté de son cœur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. He desperately extracts the distorted augments from the corpse and mercilessly reattaches them inside himself, heedless of the pain and blood. Last of all, he removes the cortical implant from Nuncius's head — a melted piece of dead metal covered in lumps of brain matter. Whispering words you cannot make out, Eogunn solders it next to his heart.{/n}

Son regard est entièrement habité par la folie. Il extrait désespérément les augmentations dénaturées du cadavre et se les greffe une à une, sans se soucier du sang et de sa propre douleur. Enfin, il retire l'implant cortical de la tête de Nuncius, un morceau de métal fondu couvert de morceaux de cervelle, et murmure des paroles qui vous échappent tandis qu'il le soude à côté de son cœur.{/n}

languages.text: "Hâlâ... Evet Nuncius, biraz daha dayan. Bir olacağız..." {n}Manipülus, akıl kırıntılarını tamamen kaybetmiş. Bakışlarında deliliğe esir düştüğü görülüyor. Deforme olmuş ogmentleri acımasızca cesetten çıkarıp acıya ve kana aldırmadan kendi içine yerleştiriyor. Son olarak Nuncius'un kafasından kortikal implantı çıkarıyor... Beyin dokusu topaklarıyla kaplı erimiş, ölü bir metal parçası. Anlaşılamayan sözler fısıldayan Eogunn, onu kalbinin yanına lehimliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. He desperately extracts the distorted augments from the corpse and mercilessly reattaches them inside himself, heedless of the pain and blood. Last of all, he removes the cortical implant from Nuncius's head — a melted piece of dead metal covered in lumps of brain matter. Whispering words you cannot make out, Eogunn solders it next to his heart.{/n}

Deforme olmuş ogmentleri acımasızca cesetten çıkarıp acıya ve kana aldırmadan kendi içine yerleştiriyor. Son olarak Nuncius'un kafasından kortikal implantı çıkarıyor... Beyin dokusu topaklarıyla kaplı erimiş, ölü bir metal parçası. Anlaşılamayan sözler fısıldayan Eogunn, onu kalbinin yanına lehimliyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich bin noch ... Ja, Nuncius, ja, halte noch ein wenig durch, dann werden wir eins ..." {n}Der Manipulus hat seinen letzten Funken Vernunft verloren ... der Wahnsinn ist ihm nun ins Gesicht geschrieben. Er entnimmt dem Leichnam verzweifelt die deformierten Augmentationen und verbindet sie unerbittlich mit sich selbst, ohne auf den Schmerz und das Blut zu achten. Schließlich entfernt er das kortikale Implantat aus Nuncius' Kopf ... ein mit Spuren von Hirnmasse bedecktes geschmolzenes Stück Metall. Unverständliche Worte flüsternd, lötet es Eogunn neben seinem Herz ein.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm still... languages.text: 「私はまだ……そうだ、ヌンキウス、そうだ、もう少しだけ耐えてくれ、我々は一つになるのだ……」{n}マニピュルスは、最後の理性のかけらを失った――その眼差しは今や、完全に狂気の虜となっている。彼は、痛みも血もいとわず、死体からゆがんだオーグメティックを必死に引き抜いては、容赦なく自らの体内に取り付け直していく。最後に、彼はヌンキウスの頭から皮質インプラントを取り出す――脳組織の塊にまみれた、溶けて死んだ金属の一片を。聞き取れぬ言葉をささやきながら、エオガンはそれを自らの心臓のかたわらに溶接する。{/n}
